ksa_text: Develop and maintain enterprise data and AI strategy, including multi-year vision articulation, strategic priority identification, investment prioritization, roadmap construction, and annual strategy refresh.

dcwf.top_element_label: Provide evaluation and feedback necessary for improving intelligence production, intelligence reporting, collection requirements, and operations.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of providers of high-risk AI systems

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Leadership & Strategy is a primary or secondary domain for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant. This task KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (senior specialist).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Leadership & Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.435). External validation of this task KSA for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: McKinsey, Gartner, and Harvard Business Review consistently identify leadership and strategy skills as core differentiators for C-suite and VP data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Leadership & Strategy for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Leadership & Strategy task KSA is within scope for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant at the senior specialist tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
